suite.name: UT7-3

test.name: UT7-3 Melakukan pencarian dari beberapa filter

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Normalize Path
kw.doc: Normalizes the given path.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Add Cookie
kw.doc: Adds a cookie to your current session.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select[contains(@class, '_category')])[last()]' by value ma.country_name.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select[contains(@class, '_operator')])[last()]' by value LIKE.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select[contains(@class, '_category')])[last()]' by value CAST(msp.registration_start_date AS DATE).
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select[contains(@class, '_category')])[last()]' by value CAST(msp.registration_end_date AS DATE).
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select[contains(@class, '_category')])[last()]' by value msp.program_start_date.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select[contains(@class, '_category')])[last()]' by value msp.program_end_date.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select[contains(@class, '_category')])[last()]' by value category.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select[contains(@class, '_value')])[last()]' by value IP.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.arg: //b[contains(text(), 'GLOBAL ENTERPRISE EXPERIENCE: EXPLORING BUSINESS OPPORTUNITY IN MALAYSIA - Immersion by SEGi University Malaysia')]
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: //b[contains(text(), 'GLOBAL ENTERPRISE EXPERIENCE: EXPLORING BUSINESS OPPORTUNITY IN MALAYSIA - Immersion by SEGi University Malaysia')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element '//b[contains(text(), 'GLOBAL ENTERPRISE EXPERIENCE: EXPLORING BUSINESS OPPORTUNITY IN MALAYSIA - Immersion by SEGi University Malaysia')]' is displayed.
kw.arg: //b[contains(text(), 'GLOBAL ENTERPRISE EXPERIENCE: EXPLORING BUSINESS OPPORTUNITY IN MALAYSIA - Immersion by SEGi University Malaysia')]
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.msg: Element '//b[contains(text(), 'Woosong University Korea Exchange Program Fall 2026/2027')]' did not exist.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.

kw.name: Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.msg: Element '//b[contains(text(), 'Shih Chien Asia University Summer Program 2026')]' did not exist.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Test case ini bertujuan untuk memastikan bahwa pengguna dapat menggunakan filter untuk melakukan pencarian dari beberapa filter.

suite.doc: UT7-3 Melakukan pencarian dari beberapa filter
